input.article_headline: The Teachers Who Quit — and What They Did Next
input.article_summary: A 2,000-word feature following five teachers who left the profession in the last two years. Each found work in different sectors. All say they miss the classroom but not the system. Includes salary comparison data and exit interview statistics from the national education union.
input.target_keywords: teachers leaving profession, teacher retention, career change teachers

input.article_headline: New Bike Lanes Open on High Street
input.article_summary: Short news article about three new protected bike lanes opening in the city centre. Includes safety statistics and a quote from the transport councillor.

input.article_headline: Can Europe Feed Itself Without Pesticides? The Farmers Fighting to Find Out
input.article_summary: A 3,500-word investigation into organic and low-pesticide farming across five EU countries. Includes yield data, farmer interviews, and analysis of the EU's Farm to Fork target of reducing pesticide use by 50% by 2030. Examines the economic viability of the transition for small and medium farms.
input.target_keywords: EU pesticide reduction, organic farming Europe, Farm to Fork
input.tagging_taxonomy: Agriculture, Environment, EU Policy, Investigation, Data
